top_signals.title: Tepco ends second round of fiscal 2026 treated water release
top_signals.summary: In the just ended round, about 7,900 tons of water containing small amounts of radioactive tritium was discharged.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
